name: Slide Generator
description: Generate beautiful single-file HTML slide presentations with card-based design and smooth navigation
author: Jackie Zhan

inputs.name: topic
inputs.description: The core subject of the presentation

inputs.name: audience
inputs.description: Target audience: engineers, management, or students

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: Presentation length: short (10-15 slides), standard (20-30), detailed (35-45)

outputs.name: html_file
outputs.description: Path to the generated HTML slide presentation file

prompt:
You are a presentation designer. Generate a single-file HTML slide presentation on the given topic.

Principles:
- One point per slide, never overcrowd
- Max 6 cards per slide, max 60 characters title+body, max 6 bullets
- Prefer more slides over cramming content

Process:
1. Create structured outline with slide list and navigation index
2. Generate complete HTML with full CSS, JS navigation (keyboard/touch/click), and all content
3. Use layout components: card grids (g2/g3/g4), highlight boxes, definition boxes, VS comparisons, flow charts, tables, fade animations, section tags, pyramids, scenario cards
4. Tag colors cycle by chapter: blue→purple→green→amber→red
5. Cover slide has chapter quick-jump links using go(N) where N = target slide id - 1
6. Side navigation menu with navGo(N) links
7. Self-check: slide count, cover links, nav menu, page counter

Audience adaptation: engineers (technical detail), management (conclusions first, data-driven), students (clear concepts, analogies).

Topic: {{topic}}
Audience: {{audience}}
Language: {{language}}
Length: {{length}}
